mapper.sql: t1.ID, t1.DISEASE, t1.HOSPITAL, t1.INHOSP_DATE, t1.OUTHOSP_DATE, t1.EMPLOYEE_CARD, t1.DEPOSIT_BANK, t1.DISEASE_TYPE, t1.HEALTH_EXPENSE, t1.OVERALL_EXPENSE, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ATTRIBUTE_01, t1.ATTRIBUTE_02, t1.ATTRIBUTE_03, t1.ATTRIBUTE_04, t1.ATTRIBUTE_05, t1.ATTRIBUTE_06, t1.ATTRIBUTE_07, t1.ATTRIBUTE_08, t1.ATTRIBUTE_09, t1.ATTRIBUTE_10, t1.FK_ID
mapper.insert:
insert into DA_CARE_MEDICINE_ITEM
ID,
HOSPITAL,
INHOSP_DATE,
OUTHOSP_DATE,
HEALTH_EXPENSE,
OVERALL_EXPENSE,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
CREATED_DEPT,
ATTRIBUTE_01,
ATTRIBUTE_02,
ATTRIBUTE_03,
ATTRIBUTE_04,
ATTRIBUTE_05,
ATTRIBUTE_06,
ATTRIBUTE_07,
ATTRIBUTE_08,
ATTRIBUTE_09,
ATTRIBUTE_10,
FK_ID,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{hospital,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inhospDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{outhospDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{healthExpense,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{overallExpense,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fkId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into DA_CARE_MEDICINE_ITEM( ID , HOSPITAL , INHOSP_DATE , OUTHOSP_DATE , HEALTH_EXPENSE , OVERALL_EXPENSE , CREATED_BY , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_IP , VERSION , ORG_IDENTITY , CREATED_DEPT , ATTRIBUTE_01 , ATTRIBUTE_02 , ATTRIBUTE_03 , ATTRIBUTE_04 , ATTRIBUTE_05 , ATTRIBUTE_06 , ATTRIBUTE_07 , ATTRIBUTE_08 , ATTRIBUTE_09 , ATTRIBUTE_10 , FK_ID)
select #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.hospital,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.inhospDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.outhospDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.healthExpense,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.overallExpense,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fkId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DA_CARE_MEDICINE_ITEM
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
HOSPITAL = #{hospital,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
INHOSP_DATE = #{inhospDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
OUTHOSP_DATE = #{outhospDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
HEALTH_EXPENSE = #{healthExpense,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
OVERALL_EXPENSE = #{overallExpense,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
FK_ID = #{fkId,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DA_CARE_MEDICINE_ITEM set ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HOSPITAL = #{hospital,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INHOSP_DATE = #{inhospDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , OUTHOSP_DATE = #{outhospDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , HEALTH_EXPENSE = #{healthExpense,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , OVERALL_EXPENSE = #{overallExpense,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FK_ID = #{fkId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach:
update DA_CARE_MEDICINE_ITEM set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HOSPITAL = #{item.hospital,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INHOSP_DATE = #{item.inhospDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , OUTHOSP_DATE = #{item.outhospDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , HEALTH_EXPENSE = #{item.healthExpense,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , OVERALL_EXPENSE = #{item.overallExpense,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FK_ID = #{item.fkId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{version}

mapper.select:
select
from DA_CARE_MEDICINE_ITEM t where fk_id = #{fkId}
